background: For each of the following comparisons, plot the data as back-to-back stemplots on a common stem. Then, compare group locations and spreads.

task.answer: Comparison A. Groups have the same central locations; group 1 has greater variability (spread).
Comparison B. Group 1 has larger values on average; groups have the same variability.
Comparison C. Group 1 has a lower average and greater spread.
